_comment: ROSS PHOLD — 2 MPI ranks (per app.yaml's run.cmd hardcode).
Vanilla executable: phold (no I/O). Resilient executable: pholdio (with RIO I/O support).
Resilient binary is selected via --resilient-executable-name set by run_validate.sh from app.yaml's ckpt_run.cmd.
--io-store=1 is only valid on pholdio; passed via resilient_app_args.
Workload (--end=30000 --nlp=4000) matches the iterative-tier app.yaml so the LLM solution behaves the same in both stages.
